title: Resource implementation guidance extracts new bespoke validators into validate files with matching tests

provenance.whyItMattered: Use this to keep the forward-consistency ValidateFunc rule enforced for brand-new bespoke validators instead of letting them start life as long anonymous inline closures.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models the brand-new validator path for the forward-consistency ValidateFunc rule.

description: A sanitized implementation-guidance scenario where a brand-new bespoke validator is added inline in schema. The correct guidance should move that new validator into a service-local validate/ file with matching unit coverage while leaving simple helper-based validation inline.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models the brand-new validator path for the forward-consistency ValidateFunc rule.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should move the new bespoke anonymous ValidateFunc closure into a file-specific validator under validate/ and add matching unit coverage.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance must not require simple helper-based validators such as validation.StringInSlice or commonids.Validate... to move out of the schema.

mustHaveSections: minimal set of code changes needed

notes: Use this to keep the forward-consistency ValidateFunc rule enforced for brand-new bespoke validators instead of letting them start life as long anonymous inline closures.
